name: Esp Ldo → Voltage Adjust
description: If the LDO is configured with ``adjustable: true``, the voltage can be updated at runtime:

config_entries.label: Voltage
config_entries.description: The desired output voltage. Must be in the range ``0.5V`` to ``2.7V``.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the LDO to adjust.
